DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MATZA, and, MARY MATZA DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is off calendar. Court sua sponte stays this action and instructs plaintiff to file a probate petition to seek the desired relief. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
